passthrough.description: Prompts expected to NOT match any rule (forwarded to LLM)

prompts.text: Explain the difference between TCP and UDP in networking
What are the main features of Python 3.12?
How does garbage collection work in JavaScript?
Compare PostgreSQL and MySQL for a web application
Describe the CAP theorem in distributed systems

temporal.description: Time-sensitive prompts that should never be cached

prompts.text: What time is it in LA right now?
What is the current weather in Berlin?
How is the stock price of AAPL today?
What are the latest news headlines?

edge_cases.description: Prompts near rule boundaries for regression testing

prompts.note: was a false positive before min_score fix
